svg.title: After Montana: explicit authority, identity and observational boundaries
svg.desc: Simplified architecture. Solid cyan lines carry data, red lines carry control or safety authority, and dashed violet lines cross process or trust boundaries.

g.text: Node metric: LOC and internal import degree. Amber/red border = high Montana churn.
